doctrine_note: Project bindings for the Shot/Storyboard agent. character_markers + scene_markers + style_anchor + prompt_rules are copied verbatim from the most-authoritative on-disk source (shot_list.json for the Grog MV; ANIM-04 scene bible for the scene). The agent does not parse character bibles for these strings.

grog_playground.song_title: too big for the playground (piano power Ballad) Remix
grog_playground.character_markers: massive ogre with warm beige skin and rugged texture, smooth clean-shaven face, warm brown eyes, teal roughspun vest, fraying rope belt, patched fringe brown trousers
grog_playground.f3_r2_note: scene_markers, style_anchor, prompt_rules are NOT carried in this binding — the agent reads them at runtime from ANIM-04-scene-pack-manifest.json (scenes[<scene>].descriptor.prompt + brand_tokens.style_anchor + brand_tokens.prompt_rules). character_markers stays here but its source file + content sha256 are verified at runtime against the live file; drift aborts emission.
